q: How has your school changed since you were a child?
examiner_note:
Câu hỏi này về sự so sánh (Comparison). 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Bạn có thể nói về sự thay đổi của cơ sở vật chất (hiện đại hơn), công nghệ (nhiều thiết bị thông minh hơn), hay phương pháp giảng dạy (linh hoạt hơn). 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cấu trúc so sánh như 'dramatic transformation', 'completely revamped', 'integrated with technology', 'state-of-the-art facilities', 'shift in teaching styles'.

band7.text: My school has changed quite a lot since I was a child. The buildings are much newer now, and every classroom is equipped with a projector and a computer. Before, we only had simple blackboards and chalk, so it's a big improvement.
band7.note: So sánh rõ ràng giữa quá khứ và hiện tại. Sử dụng từ vựng ổn ('equipped', 'improvement'). Ngữ pháp chính xác.

band8.text: There has been a dramatic transformation in terms of infrastructure. The school campus has been completely revamped with state-of-the-art facilities, such as a modern science lab and an extensive library. Also, technology has been integrated into almost every aspect of the lessons.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao ('dramatic transformation', 'revamped', 'state-of-the-art', 'integrated'). Diễn đạt gãy gọn.

band9.text: The school has undergone a profound evolution, not just physically but also in its pedagogical approach. While the facilities have certainly become more sophisticated, what's even more striking is the shift towards a more student-centered learning environment that emphasizes critical thinking over rote memorization.
band9.note: Từ vựng ở trình độ rất cao ('profound evolution', 'pedagogical approach', 'sophisticated', 'striking', 'student-centered', 'rote memorization'). Cách lập luận rất sâu sắc và mạch lạc.

v.example: The city has undergone a dramatic transformation over the last decade.

v.meaning: được tân trang/thay đổi hoàn toàn
v.example: The website has been completely revamped to improve user experience.

v.meaning: cơ sở vật chất hiện đại nhất
v.example: The research center is equipped with state-of-the-art facilities.
Modern classrooms are fully integrated with technology to enhance learning.

v.meaning: sự tiến hóa/phát triển sâu sắc
v.example: The company has undergone a profound evolution since its founding.
The school adopted a more interactive pedagogical approach.

v.meaning: lấy học sinh làm trung tâm
v.example: A student-centered learning environment encourages active participation.
University education aims to develop students' critical thinking skills.

v.meaning: học vẹt/học thuộc lòng máy móc
v.example: Many educators argue that rote memorization is an ineffective way to learn.
There is a striking resemblance between the two sisters.
The government is investing heavily in the country's infrastructure.
The building has undergone major renovations over the summer.
Modern medical equipment is becoming increasingly sophisticated.
The university has an extensive library with over a million books.
The new kitchen is fully equipped with modern appliances.
The teacher used a projector to show the students a documentary.
Traditional classrooms usually have a blackboard and chalk.
There has been a significant improvement in her test scores.
The modernization of the factory will lead to increased efficiency.
The old hotel is currently closed for renovation.
The company's expansion into international markets has been very successful.
Many schools now use interactive whiteboards instead of traditional ones.
Students have access to a wide range of digital resources for their research.
There has been a global shift towards renewable energy sources.
Online platforms allow for more personalized learning experiences.
The library has been redesigned to include more collaborative spaces for groups.
The new building was designed with sustainability in mind.
The university is working to improve accessibility for students with disabilities.
The curriculum has been updated to include a more global perspective.
Participating in extracurricular activities helps students develop soft skills.
The school aims to meet the diverse needs of its student population.
A positive learning environment is crucial for academic success.
The university is a hub for research and innovation.
The modern economy is becoming increasingly technology-driven.
She is a very resourceful teacher who always finds new ways to engage her students.
In a changing academic world, it's important to be adaptable and open to new ideas.
We have a flexible work schedule that allows us to manage our time better.
The principal's visionary leadership has transformed the school.
The school celebrated its 50th anniversary, a major milestone in its history.
The former teacher left a lasting legacy of inspiration at the school.
The school has a long and proud tradition of academic excellence.
Modernization of the facilities has significantly improved student life.
The new teaching methods have had a positive impact on student grades.
The final outcome of the project was better than we expected.
The university maintains high academic standards for all its programs.
The quality of education at this school is very high.
The staff show a strong commitment to their students' well-being.
Her dedication to her work is an inspiration to us all.
Winning the science fair was a great achievement for the class.
The school received recognition for its innovative teaching methods.
